summary: Complete frontend testing of BookMyVenue landing page redesign. All 15 test features passed successfully. The landing page now follows a tech marketplace/SaaS design with white background, minimal gold CTA buttons, and clean typography.

issues: Body background is rgb(249,249,247) - very light off-white instead of pure white (rgb(255,255,255)). This is minor and still provides white theme feel.

test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign complete and fully functional. All navigation buttons working, search form functional with all 5 fields, all 7 city cards present and clickable, 4 live activity cards, 5 capability cards, two-sided marketplace section with CTA buttons, footer with Platform/Company/Top Cities links - no emotional slogans.

structure_tests.hero_headline: PASS - 'India's Venue Booking Marketplace' renders correctly
structure_tests.search_module_5_fields: PASS - City dropdown, Event Type dropdown, Guests input, Date input, Search button all present
structure_tests.data_strip: PASS - Shows: 3,000+ Verified Venues | 12,000+ Events Completed | 10+ Cities | 128 Live Updates Today
structure_tests.browse_by_city: PASS - 7 city cards (Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Goa, Udaipur)
structure_tests.two_sided_section: PASS - For Customers and For Venue Partners columns present
structure_tests.expansion_section: PASS - Expanding Across India section renders
structure_tests.footer: PASS - Platform, Company, Top Cities links present, no slogans

search_form_tests.search_submit: PASS - Navigates to /venues with all query params

design_validation.no_emotional_taglines: PASS - No 'We Negotiate You Celebrate' or similar phrases
design_validation.no_hero_images: PASS - Hero is text + search only
design_validation.gold_cta_color: PASS - #C7A14A correctly applied to CTA buttons
design_validation.dark_typography: PASS - Text colors are dark grey (rgb(17,24,39))
